# Supplementary Tables {.appendix}

```{=typst}
#lorem(100)
```

| Parameter | Value  | Unit   | Source          |
|-----------|--------|--------|-----------------|
| α         | 0.05   | —      | @einstein1905   |
| β         | 1.23   | m/s    | @abbott2016     |
| γ         | 0.987  | kg     | @misner1973     |
| δ         | 42.0   | Hz     | @einstein1905   |
| ε         | 3.14   | rad    | @abbott2016     |

: Model parameters used in simulations {#tbl-parameters}

```{=typst}
#lorem(200)
```
